75293.subject: Visa, Stripe & 140 companies launch Open USD to rewrite who profits from stablecoins 🪙; ChatGPT linked your bank …
75293.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/fintechpulse1096

Hey Everyone,
Good morning & happy Wednesday! Today’s issue is super hot as we’re diving into Visa, Stripe, and 140 companies, which just launched Open USD to rewrite stablecoin economics (what Open Standard & OUSD is all about, why it matters, and what it means for the future of finance & fintech + bonus deep dives into Circle, Coinbae and the ultimate list of stables resources [ https://substack.com/redirect/bec99081-032a-494c-a5c2-7e57f0e9b2a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), AI giant OpenAI that just proved it can get users to hand over their financial data voluntarily (what expanding access to personal finance feature for ChatGPT tells us & which fintechs are now the most vulnerable + bonus dive into OpenAI’s Super App Strategy [ https://substack.com/redirect/59c46e6d-7e6f-48b3-b0a3-6c0e2c2081a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] and The Founders Playbook for Winning Attention in the AI Age [ https://substack.com/redirect/8e9bc84f-ff12-4925-8ad8-474b27341bb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), and Claude Fable 5, which is now officially returning tomorrow (what the return of Anthropic’s most powerful LLM tells us & why the first federal AI recall already changed everything + bonus Mythos 5 Prompting Playbook [ https://substack.com/redirect/e0777bc4-4b71-4786-8775-3ae31a6b1e2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] & how to Unlock Claude Fable 5 Lite on Claude Opus 4.8 [ https://substack.com/redirect/4e20d29f-2232-4114-b607-e572be49ec37?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside). So let’s just jump straight into the finnovative stuff 🌶️
Visa, Stripe, and 140 companies launch Open USD to rewrite who profits from stablecoins 😳🪙
The BIG News 🔥 Yesterday, 140 companies that collectively touch most of the world’s payment volume decided they’d rather own the stablecoin than rent it.
Open USD, backed by Visa, Mastercard, Stripe, BlackRock, BNY Mellon, Coinbase [ https://substack.com/redirect/19da5ee4-da2d-4fe0-9607-afb48fb6cdd0?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], Shopify, Rakuten, and DoorDash, among many others, is a new dollar-pegged stablecoin built around one inversion: the partners who drive adoption capture nearly all the reserve yield, not the issuer.
Zero mint and redemption fees. No volume caps.
No wonder Circle’s [ https://substack.com/redirect/b31cc7b3-574f-4b71-b7c5-a940253703e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] $CRCL  stock dropped nearly 14% within hours…
So let’s take a closer look at this and break down the real economics behind Open USD, what each type of partner stands to gain, why JPMorgan and the largest U.S. banks are assembling a rival stablecoin bloc, and the three signals that will tell you whether O

75292.subject: 🏆 Claude Fable 5 beats the ban
75292.body:
----------
######                  [Collaborate with us](https://utm.genai.works/r/he2t9cz)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** Anthropic had a wild day. The US lifted the ban on Claude Fable 5, so its most powerful model comes back tomorrow, and it launched a new Sonnet 5 the same afternoon. The big labs also aimed AI at curing disease. Google cut the price of AI video to pennies, and OpenAI halved what it costs to run ChatGPT.



**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Claude:** Why is its most powerful model suddenly back?

* **Science:** Why did OpenAI and Anthropic both pivot to research on the same day?

* **Google:** How cheap is AI video now?

* **OpenAI:** What did it just halve?


----------



----------
## Claude Fable 5 beats the ban

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/73ef9b68-390e-401c-8bd7-4ed6c81a1f9e/Beehiiv_02_-_Jul_1.png?t=1782897066)
Caption: 

The most locked-down model in AI is coming back. 

Anthropic said Claude Fable 5 returns globally tomorrow, after the US Commerce Department lifted the export ban that pulled it offline last month.

Fable 5 went dark on June 12, when Washington ordered every foreigner cut off from it, after Amazon found a way to jailbreak its cyber guardrails. 

Anthropic and the government spent three weeks building a fix. New classifiers now catch the dangerous cyber tasks, and Anthropic says they block that jailbreak 99% of the time.

There's a leash on it. To stay safe, Fable 5 will hand some routine coding and debugging to Opus 4.8 for now, and Anthropic will loosen the filters over the coming weeks. 

It's back on [Claude.ai](https://Claude.ai), Claude Code and Claude Cowork, for _up to half your weekly usage_ through July 7, **then on usage credits after.**

And that was only Anthropic's second headline of the day. 

It also shipped[ Claude Sonnet 5](https://techcrunch.com/2026/06/30/anthropic-launches-claude-sonnet-5-as-a-cheaper-way-to-run-agents/), its most agentic mid-tier model, near Opus quality at a fraction of the price with a 1M-token context window, already the default in Claude Code. 

The lab that spent a month locked out of its own model got it back and launched a new one before lunch.


----------









----------
## [A few hours left before you lose the early investor perks](https://utm.genai.works/r/stw03gw)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/801c11e3-29cc-497d-8ee1-360c6ce64a9b/ChatGPT_Image_Jun_30__2026__12_39_30_PM.png?t=1782812385)
Follow image link: (https://utm.genai.works/r/stw

75256.subject: Immediate Action Required on 878341164164
75256.body:
We have detected potentially compromised Service Account credentials  
associated with your Google Cloud Platform account.




Google Cloud Platform



MY CONSOLE




Notification Suspicious Activity Alert



Potentially compromised credentials for Google Cloud Platform/API project  
My Roport (id: my-roport)



Dear Customer,


We detected a publicly exposed secret for the following OAuth client  
associated with project 878341164164:

Secret for client  
878341164164-mm5q8t2kuk26dj44prkjvl1k27q15026.apps.googleusercontent.com  
found at the following URL:  
https://github.com/NovosadovO/morning-report/blob/3984b4dc7231193fbaf225b40bf3c09d4fbaa2ff/monitor.py

To prevent potential security and abuse risks, you must take action in  
accordance with our OAuth 2.0 Policies guidance to “handle client  
credentials securely”. Your client secret may have been inadvertently  
published in public sources or websites (for instance, the credentials were  
mistakenly uploaded to a code repository). Please note that as the  
project/account owner, you are responsible for securing your client  
credentials.



Immediate action is required to generate a new secret to continue using  
OAuth. We strongly recommend that you take the following steps:


Log in to the Google Cloud Console.
Generate a new client secret following these instructions.
Update any applications or websites to use the new client secret
Take immediate steps to ensure that your client secrets are not embedded in  
public source code systems, stored in download directories, or  
unintentionally shared in other ways.

Thank you for ensuring that your Google OAuth clients are secure. Together  
we can make sure that you and your users are safe.

Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Team




GO TO MY CONSOLE




Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Trust & Safety




Google

© 2016 Google Inc. 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about  
important changes to Google Cloud Platform or your account.

75208.subject: Quick Hello from Runable!
75208.body:
Hi,

I'm Abhijeet from team Runable. You're one of our most active users, and I
wanted to reach out personally.

We're looking to feature a few people from our community, and before
anything, I'd just love to connect and hear about your experience, what's
working for you, what's getting in your way, and how Runable has been for
you so far.

Would you be open to a quick chat? Please select your preferred time slot:
https://calendly.com/abhijeet-runable/30min

Thanks for being with us,

Abhijeet
Team Runable

75191.subject: Cenová po(sh)nuka
75191.body:
Zdravím Ruslana a Oleh ! 💍🤍

Podarilo sa nám sfinalizovať cenovú ponuku na výzdobu.

Cenová ponuka je samozrejme kostra - ak budete chcieť niečo ubrať alebo
pridať, samozrejme zmeny doladíme, pretože ste neposlali žiadne obrázky k
výzdobe, tak sme išli len podľa toho čo sme sa rozprávali..
Radi si prejdeme všetko. Sme otvorení konštruktívnej kritike aj úprimnému
názoru, takže sa nebojíme slov "toto nechcem" alebo "toto sa nám nepáči",
pretože dizajn je veľmi subjektívny pocit. 😊🙏 Nenaceňovali sme obrad,
pretože nevieme ešte čo budeme a kde robiť. :)

Podávam kontakt aj na grafičku.
V prípade záujmu o svadobné oznámania či pozvánky a iné tlačoviny ako
etikety, nálepky a podobne, naša grafička z Dekami.creativ Vám je k
dispozícií, stačí ju kontaktovať, ona už o Vás bude vedieť. Ona bude
samostatne naceňovať tlačoviny (menu, zasadací poriadok...). 😊 Katarína
Nagyová -nagyovakatarina11@gmail.com
www.dekami.sk

Budeme sa tešiť na Vašu spätnú väzbu! 🩷

S pozdravom

Lenka

-- 
S pozdravom

Ing. Lenka Gattiker, MBA
Vaša osobná posh asistentka

Svadobná Agentúra PoshPosh

www.poshposh.sk
